meaning: vi.下倾,下降,下垂v.拒绝,衰落n.下倾,下降,下垂,斜面,斜坡,衰败,衰落
examples: The industry has slid into decline.
Support for the party continues to decline.
They failed to arrest the company's decline.
The recent decline in gasoline consumption is my first example that there is hope.
Pending sales of existing homes rose 0.4% in July, going against expectations of a decline.
